message:
fix(registry): grant freed names to waiters on cleanup_region/cleanup_task (bd-2wds9)

cleanup_region and cleanup_task removed active leases but never called
try_grant_to_first_waiter, causing waiter starvation when names were
freed via region/task cleanup rather than explicit unregister_and_grant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
